hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.composer/vendor/bin:$PATH" && if echo '{{file_path}}' | grep -q '\.php$'; then php-cs-fixer fix '{{file_path}}' --rules=@PSR12 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo '{{file_path}}' | grep -q '\.json$'; then jq --indent 4 '.' '{{file_path}}' > '{{file_path}}.tmp' && mv '{{file_path}}.tmp' '{{file_path}}' 2>/dev/null || true; fi
